// note: Compiles the workspace browser shell (web/src/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js. `scripts/package_workspace.py` runs `tsgo -p` on this, then lays the compiled JS + the gallery bundle into the served site. Relative imports are extensionless; the package script's static server resolves `./foo` -> `./foo.js`. No `@axiom/*` here — the shell is dependency-free vanilla web code.
